factors.rationale: The phone cases are visible but compete with each other, making it less dominant.
The cases are displayed without any context of use or ownership.
No specific benefits of the cases are communicated visually or textually.
The arrangement of the cases creates a somewhat cluttered visual experience.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
There are no visible trust signals present in the image.
The image is mostly readable, but some elements may lack clarity.
The image resembles a generic product listing rather than a campaign.
